TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kansai go mki sku Sincik Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 125.2 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga.89 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 2.37 km²), 468 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 177 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 267 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 57%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. Kwansizen ga qutux spyang hopa' rhzyal na qalang 'Tayal maki sa hugal. ays ptyaw sebu Kansai go ays psgayun 21 ru 2 alang. 2 alang hani ga, Qalang m'utu , Qalang q'yulang . rrhzyal nya hugal maki Cikuto sa yatux htgan wagi' na Sincik. Syenchaw Syenchaw nniqun na ita' Taywan qani ga kahul M'utu qani qu nyux pmhi. rekisi sinlwan nha "kayu' qmasan" qu qalang M'utu', mwah Gipun lga sllwan nya "Kwansicye", yalaw gi "Kansai" son Gipun qu "ramat qmasan" si ptnaq balay, ru t'aring kya lga ini p'iyuw lalu' nya tehuk misu. kawas 1945 laxan nha "syu" ru "kun" pslalu' rhzyal sni' na Gipun, 'iyugun nha "Sinciku kyen" ru "Kwansicye" ga 'iyugun nha "Kwansicng". kawas 1950 syun nha te "Sinciku kyen" tehuk misu. tuqi qsya' cyux maki te hbun "llyung qnryang Kacing" ki "llyung Bongsan". rrhzyal nya kyahu' nya ga cyux sobih qalang Nahuy ki hnsan syan, yatux byqan wagi' ga sobih Sinpuzen, yatux tltu' ga sobih longtan na Tawyun, 'llaw htgan wagi' ga sobih Pyasan ki Cyama na Tawyun. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal baqun ana ima' qu "Kwansi Syenchaw", spqasan na Kwansizen qutux qutux kawas qu "Syebchawcye" qani. kayal kihrhur na kayal nya ga 23℃, ini spzyang kilux. ngasal knalay cingay qu ngasal Kmukan ki Kahat qu nyux maki sa qalang M'utu', ngasal mrhu Gipun sraral ,syobay ki giqas srabu knalay nha misu nyux tblaq bkuw sa syaw tuqi na qalang M'utu. ppqbaqan 國民小學pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 關西國民小學Kwansi pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 玉山國民小學Yusan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 東光國民小學Tongkwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 南和國民小學Nanhe pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 太平國民小學Taypingp qwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 石光國民小學Sikwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 東安國民小學 Tong_anpqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 坪林國民小學Pingling pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 錦山國民小學Zinsan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 國民中學pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 關西國民中學Kwansi pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 富光國民中學Bukwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 石光國民中學Sikwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 高級中學pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng 關西高級中學Kwansi pqwasan biru l'aqi' seneng
S.PHON: kans~ɕai ɣo mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.* km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. kwans~ɕizen ɣa qutux s~ɕpjaŋ ħopaʔ rħzjal na qalaŋ ʔtajal maki s~ɕa ħuɣal. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kans~ɕai ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, qalaŋ mʔutu , qalaŋ qʔjulaŋ . rrħzjal nja ħuɣal maki ʦ~ʨikuto s~ɕa jatux ħtɣan waɣiʔ na s~ɕinʦ~ʨik. s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw nniqun na itaʔ tajwan qani ɣa kaħul mʔutu qani qu njux pmħi. rekis~ɕi s~ɕinlwan nħa "kajuʔ qmas~ɕan" qu qalaŋ mʔutuʔ, mwaħ ɣipun lɣa s~ɕllwan nja "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨje", jalaw ɣi "kans~ɕai" s~ɕon ɣipun qu "ramat qmas~ɕan" s~ɕi ptnaq βalaj, ru tʔariŋ kja lɣa ini pʔijuw laluʔ nja teħuk mis~ɕu. kawas~ɕ **** laxan nħa "s~ɕju" ru "kun" ps~ɕlaluʔ rħzjal s~ɕniʔ na ɣipun, ʔijuɣun nħa "s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku kjen" ru "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨje" ɣa ʔijuɣun nħa "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨŋ". kawas~ɕ **** s~ɕjun nħa te "s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku kjen" teħuk mis~ɕu. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ʦ~ʨjux maki te ħβun "lljuŋ qnrjaŋ kaʦ~ʨiŋ" ki "lljuŋ βoŋs~ɕan". rrħzjal nja kjaħuʔ nja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕoβiħ qalaŋ naħuj ki ħns~ɕan s~ɕjan, jatux βjqan waɣiʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ s~ɕinpuzen, jatux tltuʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ loŋtan na tawjun, ʔllaw ħtɣan waɣiʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ pjas~ɕan ki ʦ~ʨjama na tawjun. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal βaqun ana imaʔ qu "kwans~ɕi s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw", s~ɕpqas~ɕan na kwans~ɕizen qutux qutux kawas~ɕ qu "s~ɕjeβʦ~ʨħawʦ~ʨje" qani. kajal kiħrħur na kajal nja ɣa ***, ini s~ɕpzjaŋ kilux. ŋas~ɕal knalaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu ŋas~ɕal kmukan ki kaħat qu njux maki s~ɕa qalaŋ mʔutuʔ, ŋas~ɕal mrħu ɣipun s~ɕraral ,s~ɕjoβaj ki ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕraβu knalaj nħa mis~ɕu njux tβlaq βkuw s~ɕa s~ɕjaw tuqi na qalaŋ mʔutu. ppqβaqan ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******jus~ɕan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******toŋkwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******nanħe pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******tajpiŋp qwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******s~ɕikwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** toŋəanpqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******piŋliŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******zins~ɕan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******βukwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******s~ɕikwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru lʔaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ
S.FORM: Kansai go mki sku Sincik Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 125.2 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga.89 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 2.37 km²), 468 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 177 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 267 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 57%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. Kwansizen ga qutux spyang hopa' rhzyal na qalang 'Tayal maki sa hugal. ays ptyaw sebu Kansai go ays psgayun 21 ru 2 alang. 2 alang hani ga, Qalang m'utu , Qalang q'yulang . rrhzyal nya hugal maki Cikuto sa yatux htgan wagi' na Sincik. Syenchaw Syenchaw nniqun na ita' Taywan qani ga kahul M'utu qani qu nyux pmhi. rekisi sinlwan nha "kayu' qmasan" qu qalang M'utu', mwah Gipun lga sllwan nya "Kwansicye", yalaw gi "Kansai" son Gipun qu "ramat qmasan" si ptnaq balay, ru t'aring kya lga ini p'iyuw lalu' nya tehuk misu. kawas 1945 laxan nha "syu" ru "kun" pslalu' rhzyal sni' na Gipun, 'iyugun nha "Sinciku kyen" ru "Kwansicye" ga 'iyugun nha "Kwansicng". kawas 1950 syun nha te "Sinciku kyen" tehuk misu. tuqi qsya' cyux maki te hbun "llyung qnryang Kacing" ki "llyung Bongsan". rrhzyal nya kyahu' nya ga cyux sobih qalang Nahuy ki hnsan syan, yatux byqan wagi' ga sobih Sinpuzen, yatux tltu' ga sobih longtan na Tawyun, 'llaw htgan wagi' ga sobih Pyasan ki Cyama na Tawyun. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal baqun ana ima' qu "Kwansi Syenchaw", spqasan na Kwansizen qutux qutux kawas qu "Syebchawcye" qani. kayal kihrhur na kayal nya ga 23℃, ini spzyang kilux. ngasal knalay cingay qu ngasal Kmukan ki Kahat qu nyux maki sa qalang M'utu', ngasal mrhu Gipun sraral ,syobay ki giqas srabu knalay nha misu nyux tblaq bkuw sa syaw tuqi na qalang M'utu. ppqbaqan 國民小學pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 關西國民小學Kwansi pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 玉山國民小學Yusan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 東光國民小學Tongkwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 南和國民小學Nanhe pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 太平國民小學Taypingp qwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 石光國民小學Sikwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 東安國民小學 Tong_anpqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 坪林國民小學Pingling pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 錦山國民小學Zinsan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 國民中學pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 關西國民中學Kwansi pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 富光國民中學Bukwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 石光國民中學Sikwang pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 高級中學pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng 關西高級中學Kwansi pqwasan biru l'aqi' seneng

s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. kwans~ɕizen ɣa qutux s~ɕpjaŋ ħopaʔ rħzjal na qalaŋ ʔtajal maki s~ɕa ħuɣal. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kans~ɕai ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, qalaŋ mʔutu , qalaŋ qʔjulaŋ . rrħzjal nja ħuɣal maki ʦ~ʨikuto s~ɕa jatux ħtɣan waɣiʔ na s~ɕinʦ~ʨik. s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw nniqun na itaʔ tajwan qani ɣa kaħul mʔutu qani qu njux pmħi. rekis~ɕi s~ɕinlwan nħa "kajuʔ qmas~ɕan" qu qalaŋ mʔutuʔ, mwaħ ɣipun lɣa s~ɕllwan nja "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨje", jalaw ɣi "kans~ɕai" s~ɕon ɣipun qu "ramat qmas~ɕan" s~ɕi ptnaq βalaj, ru tʔariŋ kja lɣa ini pʔijuw laluʔ nja teħuk mis~ɕu. kawas~ɕ **** laxan nħa "s~ɕju" ru "kun" ps~ɕlaluʔ rħzjal s~ɕniʔ na ɣipun, ʔijuɣun nħa "s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku kjen" ru "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨje" ɣa ʔijuɣun nħa "kwans~ɕiʦ~ʨŋ". kawas~ɕ **** s~ɕjun nħa te "s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku kjen" teħuk mis~ɕu. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ʦ~ʨjux maki te ħβun "lljuŋ qnrjaŋ kaʦ~ʨiŋ" ki "lljuŋ βoŋs~ɕan". rrħzjal nja kjaħuʔ nja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕoβiħ qalaŋ naħuj ki ħns~ɕan s~ɕjan, jatux βjqan waɣiʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ s~ɕinpuzen, jatux tltuʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ loŋtan na tawjun, ʔllaw ħtɣan waɣiʔ ɣa s~ɕoβiħ pjas~ɕan ki ʦ~ʨjama na tawjun. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal βaqun ana imaʔ qu "kwans~ɕi s~ɕjenʦ~ʨħaw", s~ɕpqas~ɕan na kwans~ɕizen qutux qutux kawas~ɕ qu "s~ɕjeβʦ~ʨħawʦ~ʨje" qani. kajal kiħrħur na kajal nja ɣa ***, ini s~ɕpzjaŋ kilux. ŋas~ɕal knalaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu ŋas~ɕal kmukan ki kaħat qu njux maki s~ɕa qalaŋ mʔutuʔ, ŋas~ɕal mrħu ɣipun s~ɕraral ,s~ɕjoβaj ki ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕraβu knalaj nħa mis~ɕu njux tβlaq βkuw s~ɕa s~ɕjaw tuqi na qalaŋ mʔutu. ppqβaqan ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******jus~ɕan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******toŋkwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******nanħe pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******tajpiŋp qwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******s~ɕikwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** toŋəanpqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******piŋliŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ******zins~ɕan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******βukwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******s~ɕikwaŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ****pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ ******kwans~ɕi pqwas~ɕan βiru lʔaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ
